other_findings.source_table: HDCA Supplementary Table 9 (HDCA cell types, ontologies and markers)

other_findings.finding: CL ontology term assigned by HDCA: CL:0000540
broad_celltype: CNS_SPINAL_NEURON; systems: NERVOUS_SYSTEM; germlayer: ECTODERM
HDCA paper text contains no narrative description of DL3_NEURON or the DL/PA cluster family. The DL/PA naming is HDCA-internal terminology not inherited from Braun et al. 2023.
other_findings.source_table: HDCA full text (212kB) scanned for DL[1-6], pA[1-4], dI[1-6], dorsal spinal cord — 0 matches

evidence_quotes.context: Top gene signature derived from top DEGs for DL3_NEURON

evidence_quotes.quote: DL3_NEURON (n=9,242 cells): 100% from study=whole_embryo (HDCA de novo data, CS13-14); 1 single cell from Braun et al. 2022 bioRxiv (noise <0.01%). Original author label composition: 86.4% "DL3 neuron", 7.6% "sensory neuron", 4.0% "pA3-4 neural progenitor", 2.0% "pA2 neural progenitor".
evidence_quotes.context: per-cell source attribution from HDCA v2 zarr obs cross-tab

evidence_quotes.quote: The HDCA publication does not contain narrative discussion of the DL1-DL6 / PA1-PA4 clusters specifically; these labels appear only in Supplementary Tables 9 (markers + CL) and 16 (DEGs). The DL/PA nomenclature is HDCA-internal terminology not inherited from Braun et al. 2023, which uses Class/Subclass/Region taxonomy (Neuron/Radial glia/Neuroblast/Glioblast/Neuronal IPC) with no DL or PA labels.
evidence_quotes.context: absence-of-evidence statement from full-text + Braun S2 scan
